title: Appendix #A-4 ORS Search Results Grid
body_text:
Appendix #A-4	ORS Search Results Grid
Column Name
Column Description
Format
A
Action
P ГўВЂВ“ Print image of item
E ГўВЂВ“ Add/edit/delete Return
R ГўВЂВ“ Add/edit/delete Reinstate (Cheques only)
N ГўВЂВ“ Add/edit/delete NOC (AFTs only)
V
View
Checkbox
RI
Return status
Blank ГўВЂВ“ No Return
P ГўВЂВ“ Pending
C ГўВЂВ“ Complete
X ГўВЂВ“ Cancelled (after 6:00 pm PT) (Cheques only)
RS
Reinstate status
(Cheques only)
Blank ГўВЂВ“ No Reinstate
P ГўВЂВ“ Pending
C ГўВЂВ“ Complete
N
Image Exclude status
(Cheques only) and AFT Notice of Change status (AFTs only)
Blank ГўВЂВ“ No Image Exclude or AFT Notice of Change
P ГўВЂВ“ Pending
C ГўВЂВ“ Complete
TF
Time frame
Cheque Return Time Frames (PT):
XR ГўВЂВ“ Returned in Regular Service window (before 6:00 pm PT)
XX ГўВЂВ“ Returned in Emergency Service window (activated by Central 1)
Blank ГўВЂВ“ No Cheque Return
AFT Return Time Frames (PT)
:
R1 ГўВЂВ“ First Processing window ГўВЂВ“ 10:00 am
R2 ГўВЂВ“ Second Processing window ГўВЂВ“ 4:00 pm
R3 ГўВЂВ“ Third Processing window ГўВЂВ“ 11:00 pm
Blank ГўВЂВ“ No AFT Return
Reason
Return Reason Code
3-digit return reason code
Rgn
Clearing Region
(Cheques only)
BC ГўВЂВ“ British Columbia
AB ГўВЂВ“ Alberta/Saskatchewan
MB ГўВЂВ“ Manitoba
ON ГўВЂВ“ Ontario
OOR ГўВЂВ“ Out of Region
Type
Item Type
Cheque
AFT D ГўВЂВ“ Debit
AFT C ГўВЂВ“ Credit
Date
Date item is charged to financial institution account at Central 1
Mmm dd yyyy (Example: Jan 05 2005)
Cheque #
Cheque serial #
(Cheques only)
1ГўВЂВ“12 digits
Transit
Route and Transit Number
Example: 12340809
Account
Account number
1ГўВЂВ“14 digits
Amount
Dollar amount of item
1ГўВЂВ“8-digit dollar amount + ГўВЂВњ.ГўВЂВќ + 2 digit cents
Cur
Currency
CAD ГўВЂВ“ Canadian Dollar
USD ГўВЂВ“ US Dollar
Trace #
Trace # (Cheques)
Reference # (AFTs)
Cheques ГўВЂВ“ 1ГўВЂВ“10 digit cheque trace number
AFTs ГўВЂВ“ 1ГўВЂВ“9 digit AFT reference number
TranCode
Transaction Code
See
Appendix #A-10
, ORS Transaction Codes
FA
Fraud Alert
Contains an ГўВЂВњXГўВЂВќ if the cheque had no MICR information, possibly indicating a fraudulent item.
